description: 体验升级：微交互动效、通关庆祝、音效系统、连胜机制、成就徽章

userStories.title: 安装新依赖并准备资源文件
userStories.description: As a developer, I need lottie, expo-av, view-shot, expo-sharing installed, and placeholder asset files created.
acceptanceCriteria: lottie-react-native is in package.json dependencies
expo-av is in package.json dependencies
react-native-view-shot is in package.json dependencies
expo-sharing is in package.json dependencies
assets/lottie/ directory exists with a confetti.json placeholder (can be empty JSON object for now)
assets/sounds/ directory exists with 6 placeholder .mp3 files (pop.mp3, error.mp3, undo.mp3, lineClear.mp3, complete.mp3, achievement.mp3)
npm install completes without errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use npx expo install for Expo-compatible versions. For placeholder sounds, create minimal silent MP3 files (can be replaced with real sounds later). For confetti.json, download a free one from lottiefiles.com or use {} as placeholder.

userStories.title: 扩展 i18n 字典（成就/连胜/音效/庆祝文案）
userStories.description: As a user, I want all new UI text available in both Chinese and English.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/i18n/locales/zh.ts has new keys for: 18 achievement names, 18 achievement descriptions, streak milestone messages (3/7/14/30/100), mute toggle label, result card texts (new record, share), celebration texts
lib/i18n/locales/en.ts has corresponding English translations for all new keys
All new keys follow existing naming convention (dot-separated, lowercase)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Achievement keys: 'achievement.first-win.name', 'achievement.first-win.desc', etc. Streak: 'streak.milestone.3', 'streak.milestone.7'. Settings: 'settings.mute', 'settings.unmute'. Result: 'result.newRecord', 'result.share'.

userStories.title: 实现 useReducedMotion hook
userStories.description: As a user with motion sensitivity, I want animations to be disabled when system reduced-motion is enabled.
acceptanceCriteria: File hooks/use-reduced-motion.ts exists
Exports useReducedMotion() hook that returns boolean
On iOS/Android: reads AccessibilityInfo.isReduceMotionEnabled (or Reanimated's useReducedMotion)
Returns true when system prefers reduced motion, false otherwise
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: react-native-reanimated exports useReducedMotion() since v3. Use that directly if available, otherwise use AccessibilityInfo from react-native.

userStories.title: 实现 Cell 填数弹跳动画
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a satisfying bounce when a number appears in a cell.
acceptanceCriteria: When a number is placed in a cell, it appears with scale animation from 0.6 to 1.0 using withSpring
Opacity also animates from 0 to 1
Animation duration approximately 150ms
When reduced-motion is enabled, number appears instantly without animation
Hint numbers also get the same animation
Existing cell rendering (given/user/error/note distinction) is preserved
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Modify components/Board/Cell.tsx. Use useAnimatedStyle from reanimated. The animation triggers when cell.value changes from null to a number. Use useEffect watching cell.value to trigger the animation. Keep React.memo.

userStories.title: 实现错误抖动动画
userStories.description: As a user, I want immediate visual feedback that I placed a wrong number.
acceptanceCriteria: When a number conflicts with the solution, the cell shakes horizontally
Shake pattern: ±4px, 3 cycles, total 200ms
Uses withSequence + withTiming from reanimated
Shake happens in addition to the existing red error styling
When reduced-motion is enabled, shake is skipped (error styling still shows)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add translateX animated style to Cell. Need a trigger mechanism - could use a 'lastErrorTimestamp' or 'shakeCell' coordinate in the store that Cell watches.

userStories.title: 实现行/列/宫完成闪光
userStories.description: As a user, I want visual reward when I complete a row, column, or box.
acceptanceCriteria: When a row is fully filled with unique values 1-9, all 9 cells in that row flash
Flash effect: overlay opacity pulses 0 → 0.3 → 0 over 300ms
Same behavior for columns and 3x3 boxes
If placing one number completes multiple groups, all flash simultaneously
Detection logic correctly identifies completed groups after each placement
When reduced-motion is enabled, flash is skipped
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add detection logic to placeNumber action (or as a derived computation). Store a 'completedGroups' array in state that Board/Cell reads. After 300ms, clear it. Consider: a 'flashCells' Set<string> of 'row:col' coordinates.

userStories.title: 实现 NumberPad 按压动画和选中格脉冲
userStories.description: As a user, I want tactile feel when pressing number buttons and clear indication of selected cell.
acceptanceCriteria: Number pad buttons scale to 0.9 on press with spring animation
Buttons spring back to 1.0 on release
Selected cell border opacity pulses between 0.6 and 1.0 with 1.5s period
Pulse stops when cell is deselected
Pulse is disabled when reduced-motion is enabled
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: For NumberPad: use useAnimatedStyle + Pressable onPressIn/onPressOut or Gesture.Tap. For pulse: withRepeat(withTiming(...)) on the selected cell's border opacity in Cell.tsx.

userStories.title: 实现音效系统核心 (lib/audio)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the audio engine to preload and play sounds.
acceptanceCriteria: File lib/audio/index.ts exists
Exports preloadSounds(): Promise<void> that loads all 6 MP3 files
Exports playSound(id: 'pop'|'error'|'undo'|'lineClear'|'complete'|'achievement'): void
playSound checks isMuted from settings before playing
Exports unloadSounds(): void for cleanup
Uses expo-av Audio.Sound API
Sound volume set to 0.3-0.5
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Store isMuted in useLocaleStore (rename to useSettingsStore? or just add isMuted field to localeStore for simplicity). preloadSounds should be called in _layout.tsx after hydration.

userStories.title: 集成音效到游戏 actions + 静音开关 UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to hear sounds on key actions and toggle them off.
acceptanceCriteria: Placing a number plays 'pop' sound
Wrong number additionally plays 'error' sound
Undo plays 'undo' sound
Line/box complete plays 'lineClear' sound
Puzzle complete plays 'complete' sound
A mute toggle button exists on the stats page (near language switch)
Mute state persists across app restarts
When muted, no sounds play
preloadSounds is called on app startup after hydration
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add playSound calls in game-store.ts actions. Add isMuted to locale store or create settings store. Add toggle button in stats.tsx.

userStories.title: 实现通关庆祝流程 (Confetti + ResultCard)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a celebration experience when I complete a puzzle.
acceptanceCriteria: Completing a puzzle triggers full-screen Lottie confetti animation
Confetti plays for 2-3 seconds then disappears
After confetti, a ResultCard slides in from bottom (300ms ease-out)
ResultCard shows: difficulty, elapsed time, mistakes count, hints used
If time beats previous best for that difficulty, shows 'New Record!' highlight
ResultCard has 'Share' and 'New Game' buttons
When reduced-motion enabled, confetti is skipped, ResultCard appears immediately
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Create components/Celebration/Confetti.tsx and ResultCard.tsx. Replace existing isCompleted overlay in index.tsx with the new celebration sequence. Need to compute bestTime from stats-store.

userStories.title: 实现截图分享功能
userStories.description: As a user, I want to share my game result as an image.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping 'Share' on ResultCard captures the card as a PNG image
System share sheet opens with the captured image
Shared image contains: app name, difficulty, time, mistakes
Uses react-native-view-shot for capture
Uses expo-sharing for system share sheet
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Wrap ResultCard in a ViewShot ref. On share press: captureRef → sharing.shareAsync(uri). Add 'Cool Sudoku' watermark text at bottom of card.

userStories.title: 实现连胜系统数据层
userStories.description: As a developer, I need streak tracking logic in the stats store.
acceptanceCriteria: stats-store has new persisted fields: currentStreak (number), bestStreak (number), lastCompletedDate (string|null)
recordGame correctly updates streak: same day=no change, yesterday=increment, older=reset to 1
bestStreak is updated when currentStreak exceeds it
lastCompletedDate is set to today's date string (YYYY-MM-DD) on each completion
Existing getOverallStats uses the stored streak fields instead of computing from history
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Replace the current complex day-set computation in getOverallStats with direct field reads. Keep the history-based bestStreak computation as a migration fallback for existing users (or just reset it).

userStories.title: 实现连胜 UI 展示 + 里程碑庆祝
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my streak and get celebrated at milestones.
acceptanceCriteria: Game screen header shows flame icon + streak number between difficulty label and timer
Flame is orange (#F59E0B) when today is completed, gray (#94A3B8) when not yet
No flame shown when streak is 0
When streak reaches 3/7/14/30/100, a milestone overlay appears after game completion
Milestone overlay uses Lottie animation + congratulatory text
Stats page streak card shows flame icon
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Create components/Streak/StreakBadge.tsx. Integrate into game screen header. Milestone detection: compare currentStreak after update with milestone thresholds. Show milestone overlay AFTER ResultCard is dismissed.

userStories.title: 创建 achievement-store 并定义 18 个成就
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the achievement system foundation with all 18 definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: File stores/achievement-store.ts exists
Exports useAchievementStore with Zustand + persist
State includes: unlockedIds (string[]), unlockedDates (Record<string,string>), newlyUnlocked (string[])
18 achievements defined with id, icon (emoji), i18n nameKey, i18n descKey, condition function
condition functions correctly evaluate against a stats snapshot type
Exports checkAchievements() action that evaluates all locked achievements
Exports clearNewlyUnlocked() action
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Stats snapshot should include: totalPlayed, streakData, per-difficulty counts, last game result (time, mistakes, hintsUsed, difficulty). condition is (snapshot) => boolean.

userStories.title: 集成成就检测 + 解锁弹窗
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a celebration when I unlock an achievement.
acceptanceCriteria: checkAchievements() is called after every recordGame()
When achievement(s) unlock, newlyUnlocked is populated
After the completion celebration flow (confetti → result card → streak milestone), achievement unlock cards appear
Each card shows: Lottie sparkle background, large emoji, achievement name, description
Multiple unlocks show sequentially with 500ms delay
Cards auto-dismiss after 2s or on tap
'achievement' sound plays on each unlock
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Create components/Achievement/UnlockCard.tsx. In game screen, after ResultCard dismissed, check newlyUnlocked and show cards. Then clearNewlyUnlocked().

userStories.title: 实现成就展示页
userStories.description: As a user, I want to browse all achievements and see my progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Achievements section exists in the stats tab (below history list or as a separate scrollable section)
Shows progress: 'X/18 unlocked' with a progress bar
Grid layout displays all 18 achievements
Unlocked: colored emoji + name below
Locked: gray circle + '???' text
Tapping unlocked achievement shows detail (name, description, unlock date)
Dark mode adapted
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Can be a section at the bottom of stats.tsx, or a separate scrollable area. Use a simple FlatList/grid for the 18 items. Detail can be an Alert or bottom sheet.

userStories.title: 收尾：reduced-motion 全面检查 + 深色模式 + 测试
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify all new features work correctly across modes.
acceptanceCriteria: All animations check useReducedMotion and skip appropriately
New components (Confetti, ResultCard, StreakBadge, UnlockCard, AchievementGrid) adapt to dark mode
npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
npm test passes (existing engine tests not broken)
No new TypeScript warnings
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Go through each new component and verify dark mode colors. Check all withSpring/withTiming are gated behind !reducedMotion. Run full test suite.
